full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Finding suitable classical ML papers (2010–2012) that are peer-reviewed, non-deep learning, and not present in the uploaded submission sheet.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: the golden age of classical ml is said to be the time between 2010 - 12, As a great admirer of this I want you to suggest some published, peer reviewed research paper. Also these paper should not be present in this excel sheet.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided multiple classical ML papers from 2010–2012 (optimization, Bayesian methods, clustering) and ensured they were not present in the uploaded sheet.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Manually cross-checked suggested papers against uploaded submission sheet and verified venue/year.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Clarifying what 'primary methodological contribution' means in research context.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Is the primary contribution of this paper methodological? what is the meaning of this
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Explained difference between methodological, theoretical, empirical, and systems contributions. Helped classify selected paper correctly.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Cross-checked explanation with paper structure (algorithm proposal, modeling contribution).

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding details of the selected paper 'Copula Mixture Model for Dependency-seeking Clustering'.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: what can you say about this paper • Title: Copula Mixture Model for Dependency-seeking Clustering
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided publication venue (ICML 2011), explained core idea (copula-based mixture modeling for multi-view dependency clustering), clarified that it is a methodological classical ML paper and CPU reproducible.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked ICML 2011 publication details and confirmed modeling framework (copula + mixture + EM inference) directly from paper.

top_5_prompts.prompt: the golden age of classical ml is said to be the time between 2010 - 12, As a great admirer of this I want you to suggest some published, peer reviewed research paper. Also these paper should not be present in this excel sheet.
top_5_prompts.why_important: Directly helped identify suitable classical ML papers (2010–2012) that satisfy venue and non-duplication constraints.

top_5_prompts.prompt: what can you say about this paper • Title: Copula Mixture Model for Dependency-seeking Clustering
top_5_prompts.why_important: Helped deeply understand the selected paper’s contribution, modeling framework, and suitability for submission.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Is the primary contribution of this paper methodological? what is the meaning of this
